personal.name: Anshul Roy
personal.title: Full Stack Developer & AI Engineer
personal.tagline: Building AI systems that solve real operational friction

about.summary: I sit at the intersection of AI and systems engineering. I don't just build ML models - I ship production systems that solve real problems. From university ERP integrations to NASA competitions to AWS hackathons, I focus on AI that creates tangible operational value.
key_strengths: Rapid prototyping and shipping - 4 hackathons across 2025-2026
Full-stack AI systems - from model training to production deployment
Production-grade AWS integrations and NASA competition experience
Cross-domain experience - aerospace, health tech, fintech, accessibility

featured_projects.title: ECHO — Voice-First AI Browser
featured_projects.problem: Traditional screen readers require memorizing complex shortcuts. Web accessibility is still keyboard-centric, not conversation-centric.
solution: Built Electron browser with natural voice control (Ctrl+Space to speak)
Integrated AWS Transcribe for real-time speech-to-text streaming
Used Amazon Nova Lite AI agent for natural language intent understanding
AWS Polly (Ruth voice) for natural speech output
WebMCP protocol for websites to register voice-callable tools
demo_apps: Chat App: WhatsApp-style messaging controlled entirely by voice
E-commerce: Browse and shop using natural language
technical_highlights: Real-time audio streaming via Python WebSocket server
Tool-calling architecture - AI decides which website functions to invoke
Full ARIA support and keyboard navigation for accessibility-first design
featured_projects.impact: Makes web truly accessible through natural conversation instead of complex shortcuts
featured_projects.lead_with_this: Most comprehensive project with production-grade AWS integration

featured_projects.title: NASA HERC 2025 — Rover Collision Safety System
featured_projects.role: Technical Lead, Team Mushak (India's only team in RC Division)
featured_projects.highlight: Led technical integration for India's only team in the NASA HERC RC Division
solution: Real-time fail-safe system using Random Forest on LiDAR point cloud data
Low-latency WebSocket telemetry from PS4 controller to onboard Raspberry Pi 4
Bridged hardware sensor data with software control logic
Collision detection and autonomous braking system
featured_projects.impact: Represented India as the only team in RC Division at NASA's premier rover competition

featured_projects.title: Nudge AI Health
featured_projects.description: AI-powered health monitoring and nudging system that provides personalized health recommendations
highlights: Won 3rd place in hackathon competition - first hackathon win
Collaborative project demonstrating mentorship and teamwork
Implemented AI-driven health recommendations and monitoring

featured_projects.title: JakeyBot — Live Streaming Automation Suite
featured_projects.problem: YouTube Live creator needed 24/7 automated chat management without technical overhead
solution: OAuth 2.0 token persistence and auto-refresh for 24/7 uptime
Multi-threaded Tkinter GUI preventing UI freezes on high-volume chat data
Fault-tolerant JSON storage with atomic writes for viewer loyalty points
Packaged into single Windows .exe via PyInstaller for non-technical distribution
featured_projects.impact: Production use by live streamer - shows product thinking beyond just code
technical_highlights: Handles concurrent chat operations without blocking UI
Robust error handling for network failures and API rate limits

featured_projects.title: Finance Tracker (Zorvyn Assessment)
featured_projects.description: Full-stack finance tracking application demonstrating financial data management capabilities
highlights: Completed as part of internship screening process
Showcases financial data management and user authentication

additional_hackathons.title: GenAI Zurich Hackathon 2026
additional_hackathons.note: International hackathon participation - strong signal of global engagement

responsibilities: Built end-to-end pose correction pipeline linking real-time video input to rule-based evaluation engine
Replaced Roboflow with custom internal data annotation tool, cutting manual labeling time
Fine-tuned YOLOv11 Pose Estimation on custom datasets for exercise-specific keypoint detection
Worked in Agile with Git, managing merge requests on core exercise classification engine

portfolio_presentation_strategy.hero_section: Lead with ECHO Browser (Amazon Nova Hackathon 2026) - most comprehensive project with production-grade AWS integration
project_order: ECHO Browser (AWS hackathon with comprehensive tech stack)
Finance Tracker / Zorvyn Assessment (internship screening - fintech)
NASA HERC (competition prestige - India's only team)
Nudge AI Health (3rd place hackathon win)
avoid: Don't bury ECHO - it's well-documented with real AWS integrations
Don't skip Zurich and Miro hackathons - 3 hackathons in ~6 months is impressive
Don't feature Complete-Python or Kubernetes-Experimentation as portfolio projects
Don't use generic phrases like 'passionate about technology' or 'love solving problems'
emphasize: You ship complete systems with production-grade integrations (AWS, NASA competition)
Intersection of AI and systems engineering
Hackathon success and competition experience (3rd place, NASA, international)
Consistent velocity - 4 hackathons and competitions across 2025-2026
